title: Purple Dragon Wings
description: A purple dragon-themed Elytra texture that adds a bold, fantasy look to Minecraft flight.
body:
![Purple Dragon Wings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46d5761bc562df04d9da2577b12d798da4977cd5_0.webp)

The Purple Dragon Wings Elytra texture pack transforms the Elytra into majestic dragon-inspired wings with a rich purple color scheme. Featuring sharp scales, smooth gradients, and a powerful fantasy aesthetic, these wings add a bold and mythical feel to flight while remaining clear and balanced during gameplay.

Designed to blend with Minecraft’s vanilla style, the texture enhances exploration, PvP movement, and creative builds without impacting performance. Perfect for players who want a fantasy-themed Elytra that stands out while staying practical and readable.

Features

Dragon-inspired Elytra wing design

Deep purple color with detailed textures

Smooth shading for a premium look in flight

Clear and recognizable during PvP and exploration

Vanilla-friendly and performance-optimized

Suitable for survival, PvP, and multiplayer servers
